name: Arizer Solo 3
summary: The understated workhorse. Hybrid heating, glass stems, all-day battery, exceptional flavour.
description: The Solo 3 is the device most patients should consider before spending more. Hybrid convection-conduction with all-glass stems means cool, smooth, flavourful vapour. Battery lasts a full medicating day. Cheaper than the Mighty, comfortable in the hand, easy to clean. The patient's quiet choice.
